title: Hello Minikube
text:
This tutorial shows you how to run a sample app on Kubernetes using minikube.
The tutorial provides a container image that uses NGINX to echo back all the requests.

Deploy a sample application to minikube.
Run the app.
View application logs.

This tutorial assumes that you have already set up
minikube
.
See
Step 1
in
minikube start
for installation instructions.
Note:
Only execute the instructions in
Step 1, Installation
. The rest is covered on this page.
You also need to install
kubectl
.
See
Install tools
for installation instructions.
